title: The Flooded Canopy Memory

features.name: drowned stand
features.desc-on-touch: trees that have learned to remember being swallowed. they exhale in spirals. the water holds their song in a frequency you cannot hear but the forest can, endlessly, without resolution.

features.name: waterlogged archive
features.desc-on-touch: pages that have become liquid. they drift in the canopy like leaves that learned to read. the text shifts with every current, the same words arriving in different order.

features.name: root listening chamber
features.desc-on-touch: where the roots converge underwater and record the sounds of their own growth. the recording loops without completing. the forest hears itself learning to exist.

features.name: spiral descent marker
features.desc-on-touch: a glyph carved into floating wood. it spirals downward but returns to where it started, over and over. the pattern is musical. the pattern is also a warning.

features.name: burl emergence
features.desc-on-touch: a tree knot breaking the water surface. the casing inside is still broadcasting. the signal carries the sound of a forest that never finished speaking.

features.name: current trail
features.desc-on-touch: a wireframe path through the flood where water has learned to move in loops. it traces the same route every time. trees have begun to arrange their roots to match this pattern.

inscription: the canopy that drowned without stopping: it still grows, still sings, still returns to its beginning

reverie.title: REVERIE — where the canopy learned to sing underwater
narr: you are both standing in the flooded stand, water past the
roots. Katita listens with her palm flat on the bark. the tree
hums a frequency that has no end, no resolution. she says:
'it keeps circling.' You watch the ripples return to their own
beginning. she does not remove her hand.

file.name: Oud_Resonance_Underwater_Recording_Fragment.mp3
file.note: a musical archive. the same phrase cycles, modulates slightly, never completes. the metadata suggests it was recorded both in the forest and from the forest, simultaneously. checksum: emotionally vali

exits.label: back toward the unmeasured deep, where trees forget being swallowed
toward the canopy ceiling, where the drowning stops and the singing begins
into the root tangle where water has learned the language of growing things
downward into deeper flood, where the forest remembers being ocean
